testimonials.author: Sarah & Matt Lawson
testimonials.quote: Prestige Realty made our dream home a reality. Their team was attentive, professional, and found us exactly what we were looking for within our budget.

testimonials.author: James Okafor
testimonials.quote: The commercial advisory team provided invaluable insights that helped me expand my portfolio with confidence. ROI exceeded projections by 20%.

testimonials.author: Priya Mehta
testimonials.quote: From the first showing to move-in day, the experience was seamless. The apartment is everything I pictured and more. Absolutely five-star service.

faq.question: How do I start the home buying process?
faq.answer: Begin with a free consultation with one of our agents. We'll assess your needs, budget, and timeline, then guide you through pre-approval, property search, offers, and closing.

faq.question: What fees do you charge sellers?
faq.answer: Our commission is competitive and transparent. Contact us for a personalized breakdown — we offer flexible options for luxury and standard listings.

faq.question: Do you handle rentals as well as sales?
faq.answer: Yes. We manage short-term and long-term rentals across our entire portfolio and can help you find the perfect rental property or tenant.

faq.question: How long does it take to sell a property?
faq.answer: Average days on market vary by location and price point. In our core markets, well-priced homes sell in 21–45 days. We'll give you a precise estimate at listing time.

faq.question: Can I list my property even if it needs renovations?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We offer pre-sale renovation advisory and can connect you with our trusted contractor network to maximise your sale price.

about.headline: Two Decades of Trusted Excellence
about.body: Founded in 1999, Prestige Realty has grown from a boutique Manhattan agency into one of the most respected real estate firms in the Northeast. Our philosophy is simple: put the client first, always.
about.mission: To deliver unparalleled real estate experiences built on transparency, expertise, and genuine care for every client.

timeline.event: Founded in Manhattan's Upper East Side
Expanded to Brooklyn and Queens markets
Named #1 boutique agency in New York

agents.name: Alexandra Rivera
agents.title: Senior Sales Agent
agents.bio: Alexandra has 12 years of experience specialising in Manhattan luxury properties. Her deep market knowledge and white-glove service have helped hundreds of clients find their perfect home.

agents.name: David Chen
agents.title: Commercial Specialist
agents.bio: David brings a finance background to real estate, giving investors a data-driven edge. Specialising in commercial and mixed-use properties across the tri-state area.

agents.name: Simone Dubois
agents.title: Luxury Rentals Director
agents.bio: Simone curates exceptional rental experiences for discerning clients. Her portfolio spans Tribeca lofts to the Hamptons, with an eye for design and lifestyle fit.

agents.name: Marcus Johnson
agents.title: Residential Buyer Specialist
agents.bio: Marcus is passionate about helping first-time buyers navigate the market with confidence. Known for his patience, thorough research, and strong negotiation skills.

listings.title: Central Park Penthouse
listings.description: A crown jewel above Central Park. This full-floor penthouse offers panoramic park and skyline views from every room. Featuring chef's kitchen, private terrace, and a bespoke master suite.

listings.title: Williamsburg Creative Loft
listings.description: Industrial chic meets modern comfort in this stunning Williamsburg loft. Exposed brick, 14-foot ceilings, and massive windows flood the space with natural light.

listings.title: Tribeca Grand Residence
listings.description: Elegance defined. This Tribeca residence combines pre-war character with contemporary finishes. Soaring ceilings, wide-plank hardwood floors, and a chef-approved kitchen.

listings.title: Hamptons Oceanfront Estate
listings.description: The pinnacle of Hamptons luxury. This oceanfront masterpiece spans nearly an acre with 200 feet of private beach, a heated pool, tennis court, and a guest house.

listings.title: Midtown Office Tower Suite
listings.description: Prime Midtown commercial space with Empire State Building views. Fully built-out Class A office suite with private conference rooms, reception, and 24/7 access.

listings.title: Luxury High-Rise Rental
listings.description: Sky-high living in a brand-new luxury tower. Floor-to-ceiling windows, designer finishes, and world-class amenities including rooftop pool and private cinema.

listings.title: Park Slope Brownstone
listings.description: A meticulously restored 1895 brownstone with all modern upgrades. Original tin ceilings, ornate fireplaces, and a private garden in the heart of Park Slope.

listings.title: Soho Artist's Duplex
listings.description: A magnificent SoHo duplex occupying a converted cast-iron building. Gallery-white walls, multiple skylights, and a spiral staircase — an artist's dream.

listings.title: Astoria Family Home
listings.description: A charming, well-maintained Astoria family home with original hardwood floors, a large backyard, and proximity to great schools, restaurants, and the N/W subway.

listings.title: Jackson Heights Co-op
listings.description: Bright and airy co-op in the heart of Jackson Heights. Updated kitchen and bath, generous closet space, and a welcoming community with low maintenance fees.

sections.heading: Information We Collect
sections.body: We collect information you provide directly to us, including when you fill out contact forms, create an account, or communicate with our agents. This includes name, email address, phone number, and any messages you send.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Information
sections.body: We use the information we collect to respond to your enquiries, provide our real estate services, send you relevant listings and updates (with your consent), and improve our platform.

sections.heading: Data Security
sections.body: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We never sell your information to third parties.

sections.heading: Cookies
sections.body: Our website uses essential cookies to provide core functionality and analytics cookies to understand usage patterns. You may opt out of analytics cookies via your browser settings.

sections.heading: Contact Us
sections.body: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at privacy@prestigerealty.com or at our office address.

sections.heading: Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using the Prestige Realty website, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

sections.heading: Use of Services
sections.body: You may use our services for lawful purposes only. You may not use our platform to scrape data, send spam, or engage in any activity that could harm our systems or other users.

sections.heading: Listing Accuracy
sections.body: While we strive for accuracy, property listings are provided for informational purposes. Prices, availability, and details may change. Always verify information directly with an agent.

sections.heading: Intellectual Property
sections.body: All content on this website — including images, text, and branding — is the property of Prestige Realty or its licensors. Unauthorised reproduction is prohibited.

sections.heading: Limitation of Liability
sections.body: Prestige Realty shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services or reliance on listing information.
